name: upstream-pulse
description: Automated upstream open source contribution tracking and insights for your organization

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:kill-pf && npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n db,api,ui -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:infra:logs" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:cluster: npm run dev:stop-docker-db && concurrently -k -n pf,api,ui -c blue,green,magenta "npm run db:port-forward" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis && npm run dev:infra:wait
scripts.dev:infra:wait: until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && echo 'Postgres ready'
scripts.dev:stop: npm run dev:kill-pf; docker compose down
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:pgadmin: docker start pgadmin 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name pgadmin -p 5050:80 -e PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL=admin@admin.com -e PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD=admin dpage/pgadmin4

author: Upstream Pulse Contributors
